actionCalls.description: Hands the change-event header to the subscriber Apex sink, which records a SubscriberCdcMarker__c capturing the header scalars for release-test verification. The whole injected DTO_ChangeEventHeader is mapped to the request wrapper's single header field.
actionCalls.name: PersistHeader
actionCalls.label: Persist Header

Flow.description: Subscriber-namespace release-test flow bound to a kern__TriggerAction row for the SubscriberCdcProbe__ChangeEvent dispatch. Declares the typed header input variable (kern__DTO_ChangeEventHeader) the framework injects on a Change Data Capture dispatch and hands the whole header object to the TST_CdcHeaderSink Apex invocable. Proves a subscriber Flow can receive the platform change-event header through DTO_ChangeEventHeader and pass it to subscriber Apex across the namespace boundary.
Flow.label: TST Subscriber Flow CDC Header Recorder

variables.description: Change-event record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow. Read-only here; the header carries the data this flow records.
variables.name: record

variables.description: Typed Change Data Capture header injected by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow for a change-event dispatch. The whole point of the test: a subscriber flow declaring this Apex-defined variable receives the platform header and hands it to subscriber Apex.
variables.name: header

variables.description: Pre-update change-event record passed in by kern.TRG_InvokeFlow on update dispatches. Read-only; declared so the framework can supply it without an unused-key error.
variables.name: recordPrior
